desc: A gentle botanist who communes with the life force of Sol-3 itself. Verina channels Spectro energy through her rectifier to nurture and protect, her healing abilities drawn from the very essence of nature's restorative power.

skills.d: Perform up to 4 Spectro attacks. Every 3rd attack triggers a minor party heal scaling with Verina ATK.
Summon a field of healing flora that restores HP to all party members over 10s. While active, increases party ATK by 10%. CD: 16s.
Unleash a burst of life energy that fully heals the party and grants Photosynthesis buff: +20% ATK for 20s. CD: 20s. Energy Cost: 110.
Overhealing generates Bloom stacks (max 3). Each stack increases the next Resonance Skill's healing by 25%.
Heal incoming Resonator and increase their ATK by 15% for 30s.
